name: Treasure Trap
short_description: Pudi is an adventure lover who goes after the gold in the treasure map he got from a traveler. He now faces a dungeon of various challenges, the Color Dungeon! Will he finally be able to reach the gold he seeks or will everything be left with pain?
detailed_description: Treasure trap is a 2d platform game consisting of difficult levels full of unexpected traps. Pudi (our main character) is an adventure lover who goes after the gold in the treasure map he got from a traveler. He now faces a dungeon of various challenges, the Color Dungeon! Will he finally be able to reach the gold he seeks or will everything be left with pain?
about_the_game: Treasure trap is a 2d platform game consisting of difficult levels full of unexpected traps. Pudi (our main character) is an adventure lover who goes after the gold in the treasure map he got from a traveler. He now faces a dungeon of various challenges, the Color Dungeon! Will he finally be able to reach the gold he seeks or will everything be left with pain?
supported_languages: English, French, German, Traditional Chinese, Japanese
